3: The second riddle leads you to Starglass─more specifically, to one of the four streetlamps surrounding the plaza. Armed with another clue, you prepare to roam the deserted streets once again in search of the next hiding place.

The second riddle leads you to the starglass─more specifically, to one of the four streetlamps surrounding the plaza. Armed with another clue, you prepare to roam the deserted streets once again in search of the next hiding place.

73: All right, time for the next one! The “four lamps” looming over “streets of glass”─well, they're the streetlights in Starglass! The bit about “one true light” shining on Her Majesty is because you were supposed to look for the streetlamp closest to the Meso Terminal!
